scope: Agency → Model → Client E2E Flow: Create, Save, Location, Photos, Invite/Claim, Client Visibility

bugs.title: agency_update_model_full Create-Call without error check
bugs.root_cause: await supabase.rpc('agency_update_model_full', ...) return value was completely ignored in the Create branch. RPC failure caused silent missing agency_relationship_status and sports/visibility flags.
bugs.fix: Added const { error: updateErr } = ... with console.error + Alert.alert on failure.

bugs.title: claim_model_by_token did not set agency_relationship_status = active
bugs.root_cause: claim_model_by_token set user_id but left agency_relationship_status = 'pending_link'. Roster badge condition checks agency_relationship_status === 'pending_link' OR (!user_id && email) — after claim, first condition stayed true, badge persisted.
bugs.fix: New migration 20260520_claim_model_by_token_set_active.sql: added UPDATE models SET agency_relationship_status = 'active' WHERE agency_relationship_status = 'pending_link' after user_id update.

bugs.title: get_discovery_models lost effective_city CTE in migration 20260508
bugs.root_cause: Migration 20260508 replaced get_discovery_models commenting 'logic unchanged' but dropped the effective_locations CTE from 20260409. effective_city was NULL in all responses. City-Boost used m.city (models table) instead of canonical model_locations priority (live>current>agency). canonicalDisplayCityForModel fell back to models.city.
bugs.fix: New migration 20260519_get_discovery_models_restore_effective_city.sql: restored effective_locations CTE (DISTINCT ON model_id, live=0/current=1/agency=2), added LEFT JOIN, COALESCE(el.effective_city, m.city) AS effective_city, City-Boost on COALESCE.
bugs.already_fixed_by_20260509: get_models_by_location city filter (model_locations subquery) was fixed by 20260509

bugs.title: CustomerSwipeScreen legacy inline mapping without URL normalization
bugs.root_cause: Two inline model mappings in the getModelsPagedFromSupabase legacy path used gallery: m.portfolio_images ?? [] without normalizeDocumentspicturesModelImageRef. The mapDiscoveryModel function had normalization, but the inline maps bypassed it. Bare filenames or supabase-storage:// schemes could reach StorageImage.
bugs.fix: Both inline maps now use (m.portfolio_images ?? []).map((u) => normalizeDocumentspicturesModelImageRef(u, m.id)). Import already existed (line 26).

flows_verified_correct_no_changes: First-save await chain (Create: importModelAndMerge → RPC → Location → Photos → Mirror → Refresh)
GuestView: signImageUrls, HTTPS signed URLs, portfolio/polaroid separation by packageType
ClientWebApp.tsx Discovery: portfolio_images only, normalizeDocumentspicturesModelImageRef + StorageImage
Invite dispatch: ok===true guard, no fake success
Token generation: no pgcrypto, sha256() builtin, old tokens deleted on regeneration
finalizePendingInviteOrClaim: invite-first then claim, session+token driven
Photo visibility: can_view_model_photo_storage + model_photos row alignment
not_changed: AgencyControllerView.tsx handleSaveModel location path (Alert shown, acceptable UX)
Portfolio vs Polaroid vs Private separation
Location source priority live > current > agency (restored by BUG 4 fix)

migrations_deployed.live_verified: pg_get_functiondef confirms agency_relationship_status = 'active' and pending_link guard

known_remaining_risks.risk: Edit-Save: location fail leads to step3Succeeded = true
known_remaining_risks.rationale: Alert IS shown to user. Model fields DID save. Consistent with acceptable UX pattern.
Deprecated, isolated in Step 2 try/catch, guard user_id IS NULL in DB. No new code uses it.

known_remaining_risks.risk: get_discovery_models without SET row_security TO off
known_remaining_risks.rationale: Unchanged from 20260508 baseline. SECURITY DEFINER runs as function owner (superuser). No new risk introduced.

known_remaining_risks.risk: CORS for local dev on send-invite
known_remaining_risks.rationale: Only affects non-production origins. Production domains correctly in ALLOWED_ORIGINS.
